name: aimarket-oracle-gateway
description: MCP server (Model Context Protocol, stdio): verifiable oracle services for AI agents — Platon VRF (Ed25519-signed unbiasable randomness), Chronos VDF (verifiable delay / proof-of-elapsed-time), LUMEN reputation (PageRank/EigenTrust trust scores). Pay-per-call over the AIMarket protocol, no signup; every result is independently verifiable. Tools: get_random, get_randomness_beacon, ask_oracle, compute_vdf, verify_vdf, get_reputation_scores, list_oracle_capabilities.
